message.content:
@startuml
participant Actor as Actor
participant Interface as CarPart

interface CarPart {
    PrintPart()
    AddPart(v interface{})
    RemovePart(v interface{})
}

participant Engine as Engine
participant Suspension as Suspension
participant Car as Car

Engine << Container : list.List >>
Suspension << Container : list.List >>
Car << Container : list.List >>

Actor "C" CylinderBlock
Actor "C" Sump
Actor "C" Crankshaft
Actor "C" Rod
Actor "C" Absorber
Actor "C" Damping
Actor "C" Stabilizer
Actor "C" Rack
Actor "C" Lever
Actor "C" Spring

Engine "C" CylinderBlock
Engine "C" Sump
Engine "C" Crankshaft
Engine "C" Rod

Suspension "C" Absorber
Suspension "C" Damping
Suspension "C" Stabilizer
Suspension "C" Rack
Suspension "C" Lever
Suspension "C" Spring

Car "C" Engine
Car "C" Suspension

CarPart "I" CarPart
    << Interface >>
    PrintPart()
    AddPart(v interface{})
    RemovePart(v interface{})

    CarPart -- Engine : AddPart
    CarPart -- Suspension : AddPart
    CarPart -- Car : AddPart

    Engine -- CarPart : RemovePart
    Suspension -- CarPart : RemovePart

@enduml
